description: You are a GIS analyst. Identify and export a list of major South American cities (CONTINENT = 'South America') that are safe from river flooding using the 'countries_base.gvsproj' project. Using the cities data (/home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp) and rivers data (/home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp), find cities with a population (POP_MAX) greater than 1,000,000 located more than 0.5 degrees away from any major river. Save the 0.5-degree river buffer to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/river_buffer_05deg.shp and export the final selection of safe cities to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/safe_cities.shp.
